summary: Completed comprehensive testing of mobile bottom navigation bar and live match time display features. Mobile bottom nav works perfectly across all viewports and navigation scenarios. Live match display is functional with proper status indicators.

minor_issues.issue: Requires confirm_password field in request body

minor_observations.issue: data-testid='match-card-minute' element not found in current live matches
minor_observations.details: Live matches show LIVE status badge correctly, but specific match minutes (45', 90+3') not displayed between team rows. This may be due to match data not containing minute information or matches being in HT/other states.

passed_tests: Mobile bottom nav hidden on desktop viewport (1920px)
Mobile bottom nav visible on mobile viewport (375px)
All 5 navigation items present (Home, Leaderboard, Message, Saved, Profile)
Navigation between Home and Leaderboard tabs works
Bottom nav hidden on login page
Bottom nav hidden on register page
Live match detection and display working
Live match status badges showing correctly
Live match scores displayed (1-0 Augsburg vs Hoffenheim)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor live minute display observation)
